name: Evil Eye Mesmerism
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>配</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): Activate this card by targeting 1 of those Summoned monsters in Attack Position, with less ATK than an "Evil Eye" monster you control; take control of that monster. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card. While "Evil Eye of Selene" is in your Spell & Trap Zone, that targeted monster is also treated as an "Evil Eye" monster. You can only activate 1 "Evil Eye Mesmerism" per turn.
eff: When your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): Activate this card by targeting 1 of those Summoned monsters in Attack Position, with less ATK than an "Evil Eye" monster you control; take control of that monster. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card. While "Evil Eye of Selene" is in your Spell & Trap Zone, that targeted monster is also treated as an "Evil Eye" monster. You can only activate 1 "Evil Eye Mesmerism" per turn.

eff_types: Activation requirement, Continuous-like, Continuous-like, Continuous-like, Condition
action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
